case_title: DANIEL PRUIETT VS. HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRUIETT, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA PROPERTY MANAGWMENT SYSTEMS $7,105.64 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,180.64, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $6,085.64 AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PRUIETT, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA PROPERTY MANAGWMENT SYSTEMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF DANIEL PRUIETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORAITON IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN, AGENT FOR OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA PROPERTY MANAGWMENT SYSTEMS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORPORATION DBA PROPERTY MANAGWMENT SYSTEMS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
